artifacts.description: Record-level weld threshold audit with intermediate driver calculations, margin, warning band, status, and citations.
Expert-review memo with threshold choice, sampling plan, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and recommendation table.
Reproducible generator script used to produce the required CSV and memo from the embedded packet.

notes: All calculations use only the embedded packet in input/task_brief.md.
No external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions were used.
